## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content creation progress, review processes, and next steps for Biologica's wellness hub launch.](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New post-processing steps added to integrate ingredients and brand names automatically in content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Review process involves 4 team members across medical and non-medical aspects; expecting slower feedback on medical content due to reviewer's vacation](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Transitioning from perimenopause to postmenopause content, with emphasis on inflammation and Hobabine](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Alpha site expected to launch on August 19th; planning to give GrowthX access for content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [4-person review team: 2 for medical, 2 for non-medical aspects](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Medical reviewers: Maggie (VP Regulatory, naturopathic perspective) and Nancy (retired OB, new reviewer)](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Non-medical reviewers: Liz and Joey (possibly adding another team member)](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Aiming for 2 rounds of reviews, but flexibility needed due to high content volume](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Implementing a tag system to track review status and streamline the process](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### Content Generation and Revisions

  - [Finishing perimenopause cluster before moving to postmenopause topics](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Focus on inflammation in postmenopause, highlighting Hobabine (dopamine-based ingredient)](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Planning anchor pieces: "Is Hobabine the best for postmenopause?" and "Tackling inflammation in postmenopause"](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [GrowthX to create an internal linking tool for pre-publishing article connections](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

### Site Launch and Publishing

  - [All finalized articles to go live at launch, no phased rollout](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [GrowthX to handle article publishing in Shopify CMS](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Alpha site delivery expected on August 19th (in 13 days)](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Plan to test publishing process with one article before full launch](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Visual Assets for Articles

  - [Need hero images for each article initially, in-article assets to be addressed later](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Biologica to share brand guidelines and photography direction](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [GrowthX can generate synthetic models, use stock imagery, or create line art adhering to brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Plan to experiment with image pipelines and review a batch of 5-6 sample images](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)

### Monitoring and Analytics

  - [GrowthX to set up monitoring post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Will need access to Google Search Console for SEO tracking](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Implementing geo monitoring with Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Brian to share brand guidelines and photography direction with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [GrowthX to experiment with image generation for article hero images](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Brian to initiate process for granting GrowthX access to Shopify CMS](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [GrowthX to check internal process for article revisions to ensure consistent document versions](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [GrowthX to create internal linking tool for pre-publishing article connections](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Brian to provide GSC access to GrowthX for monitoring setup post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/3awsyhn7qj1Yxi1-bKSfV_EV1Pz1HXNk?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
